    <item>
        <guid>nba526745</guid>
        <title>Shai Gilgeous-Alexander: Erupts for 47 points in OT win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/shai-gilgeous-alexander-4387</link>
        <description>Gilgeous-Alexander totaled 47 points (12-19 FG, 2-3 3Pt, 21-25 FT), five rebounds, three assists and two steals in 41 minutes during Monday's 114-110 overtime victory over the Pistons.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 30 Mar 2026 10:09:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526735</guid>
        <title>Joel Embiid: Adds 26 points despite illness</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/joel-embiid-3572</link>
        <description>Embiid stated after Monday's 119-109 loss to the Heat that he's dealing with an illness, Ky Carlin of USA Today reports. He finished with 26 points (10-25 FG, 2-6 3Pt, 4-5 FT), seven rebounds, three assists and one block in 34 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 30 Mar 2026 9:06:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526734</guid>
        <title>Ayo Dosunmu: Delivers triple-double in return</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/ayo-dosunmu-5337</link>
        <description>Dosunmu tallied 18 points (8-13 FG, 1-2 3Pt, 1-1 FT), 15 rebounds, 12 assists and three steals in 33 minutes during Monday's 124-94 win over Dallas.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 30 Mar 2026 8:36:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526733</guid>
        <title>Tyler Herro: Propels Miami to victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/tyler-herro-4780</link>
        <description>Herro accumulated 30 points (12-24 FG, 3-10 3Pt, 3-5 FT), four rebounds, three assists, two blocks and one steal over 42 minutes during Monday's 119-109 victory over the 76ers.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 30 Mar 2026 8:30:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba526732</guid>
        <title>Dillon Brooks: Expected to play Tuesday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/dillon-brooks-4125</link>
        <description>Brooks (hand) is set to return in Tuesday's game against the Magic, Duane Rankin of The Arizona Republic reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 30 Mar 2026 7:58:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
